interpretation: Seed-clustered analysis of the 10-seed S3 run (per-seed FPR n=100). Cluster-robust t-interval upper 0.0401 and cluster-bootstrap upper 0.0370 vs the 0.05 gate; design effect 1.05 (negligible clustering). The pooled Wilson interval is corroborated by the cluster-robust interval.
purpose: Cluster-robust (seed-clustered) specificity CI for the Bonn S3 G2 gate, guarding against pseudoreplication in the pooled Wilson interval.
